steps.title: Spot 'contributed by incorporating'
steps.content: The phrase 'contributed...by incorporating pop melodies into it' shows that Charli XCX is adding a new element to the hyper pop sound.

steps.title: Match the function
steps.content:
The sentence identifies an artist and her stylistic contribution to the genre, which is exactly what choice D describes.

Choices A, B, and
  • C all misread the function — A wrongly claims no change
  • B invents criticism
  • C overstates the evolution claim
.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
